summary: Website for Sandhya Stors - a multi-service shop offering ice cream, Xerox/print services, stationary, and cold drinks with business contact integration

existing_features.title: Create a homepage that displays information about Sandhya Stors as a multi-service shop offering ice cream, Xerox services, print out services, stationary, and cold drinks
Integrate WhatsApp business contact button with phone number +918250772309 that opens WhatsApp when clicked
Display business location information with a clickable link to https://sandhya-stors.grexa.site/

Design a visually appealing layout with a warm, inviting color scheme that reflects a neighborhood convenience store aesthetic, using earthy tones like warm oranges, browns, and greens with clean typography and approachable spacing
Add a URL shortener section to the Sandhya Stors homepage that allows users to paste a long URL and generate a shortened version
Display the generated shortened URL to users with a copy-to-clipboard button for easy sharing

new_feature_requests.summary: Display business services (ice cream, Xerox, print out, stationary, cold drinks)
Add URL shortener feature to Sandhya Stors website
Create backend functionality to store URL mappings with unique short codes and handle redirects from short URLs to original URLs
